response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to determine the song and performer. 2. Identified 'ええじゃないか' (Ee ja nai ka) by Dannie May, composed by Masa, from the on-screen text. 3. Used the hashtag '#森はしもの生誕祭2026' to identify the performer as 'Mori Hashimo'. 4. Searched for the lyrics of the song using the original composer and title. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-04:23 is the music performance, and 04:23-05:04 is the post-performance talk. 6. Populated the JSON with this data and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber (Mori Hashimo) performing the song "Ee ja nai ka" (ええじゃないか) by Dannie May, followed by a short post-performance interaction with her audience.

scenes.description: The VTuber performs the song "Ee ja nai ka" (ええじゃないか). Text on screen indicates 'Lyrics/Composition: Masa'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Para-rira, here must be hell
Voices that aren't even voices
Rising from the bottom of my stomach

From the swaying dull-colored sea

You're just muttering
'People are scary,' you say
Now the seven colors burst
Ai-ai, ai-ai
Dancing and scattering in the air
Acting cool with fashion beats
Don't act like a cheesy lunatic
Let's eat up the unrewarded sadness
Stained by fashion beats
If you have nothing to say, even breathing
